title: implicit bit extension of signed value of bitwise operator is different from standard

features.name: bitwise AND between signed operands of unequal bit width
features.description: Code should include a bitwise AND operation between two signed operands where the operands have different bit widths, causing the shorter operand to require zero-filling per IEEE Verilog-2005

features.name: unsigned cast of bitwise AND result
features.description: Code should include a $unsigned() cast applied to the result of a bitwise operation on signed operands to expose incorrect sign extension behavior

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance
